inputs.template: Hi [First Name], I noticed [Company] is growing fast in the [Industry] space. Many teams at your stage struggle with [Pain Point]. We recently helped a similar company achieve [Result]. Would a quick 15-minute call to explore if we can deliver similar results for [Company] make sense?
inputs.lead_context: Ryan Mitchell, CEO at GrowthEngine AI (18 employees, San Francisco). Series A raised last month ($4.2M). Hiring for 3 SDR roles (LinkedIn job posts). Company builds analytics dashboards for e-commerce. Recent blog post about scaling sales without adding headcount.
